mapper.insert: insert into payment_order(payment_no,order_no,channel,pay_amount,status,create_time,update_time) values(#{paymentNo},#{orderNo},'ALIPAY',#{amount},'PAYING',now(),now()) on duplicate key update status=if(status='SUCCESS','SUCCESS','PAYING'),update_time=now()
mapper.update: update payment_order set status='SUCCESS',third_party_trade_no=#{tradeNo},pay_time=now(),update_time=now() where order_no=#{orderNo} and status<>'SUCCESS'
update payment_order set status='CLOSED',update_time=now() where order_no=#{orderNo} and status<>'SUCCESS'
